prestazioni: Engine swap to EZ36D (3.6L H6) with forged internals: JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression forged pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series main and rod bearings, and a Tomei 272° duration camshaft kit for improved high-RPM breathing while retaining low-end torque for the Outback's AWD system.

Forced induction via a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger kit (custom-mapped by Cobb Tuning for the EZ36D) with a PWR intercooler, custom 3-inch mandrel-bent exhaust system (Catted downpipe by Nameless Performance, resonator delete, and a Borla Atak muffler for aggressive tone without drone), and a Cobb Accessport V3 flashed with a custom Stage 2+ tune optimized for 93 octane and E85 blends (max 8 psi boost, 350whp/320wtq).

Drivetrain reinforcement: Kaaz 2.5-way limited-slip differential (front and rear), STI 6-speed manual transmission swap with a South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch, and a Cusco 2-way adjustable rear subframe brace to eliminate flex under hard launches (critical for the Outback's unibody chassis). Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for the Outback's 1,600kg weight), Whiteline 27mm front and 24mm rear sway bars, and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for the rear trailing arms and front control arms.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works kit (modified for the Outback's wagon body), paired with custom 3D-printed fender flares to clear 275/35R19 Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires on Enkei PF09 wheels (19x9.5 +35 offset front, 19x10.5 +40 rear). Front lip and rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon, with a custom carbon fiber roof wrap (VIS Racing) to reduce weight and lower the center of gravity.

Aggressive stance achieved via a 1.5-inch front and 1-inch rear ride height drop (post-Ohlins install), with custom camber plates (SPL Parts) for -2.5° front and -2.0° rear camber to maximize tire contact under hard cornering. Functional hood vents (custom fabricated) to evacuate heat from the Rotrex supercharger, and a custom LED light bar integrated into the front bumper (Lux Halo 6 Pod) for rally-inspired aesthetics.

Interior overhaul with Bride Ergo II reclining bucket seats (custom-molded to the Outback's floor), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (Chassisworks bolt-in 8-point cage with gusseted main hoop) painted Subaru WR Blue. Full carbon fiber dash overlay (Seibon), Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a custom gauge pod (Defi Advance BF series) monitoring boost, oil temp, and AFR (AEM X-Series wideband).
